name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execute Files with Msdeploy
notes:
This Building Block detects file execution using the msdeploy.exe lolbin.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Execute Files with Msdeploy.exe
SIGMA Description: Detects file execution using the msdeploy.exe lolbin


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execute Files with Msdeploy on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of msdeploy.exe
when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%verb:sync%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-source:RunCommand%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-dest:runCommand%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Execute Files with Msdeploy on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of msdeploy.exe
AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%verb:sync%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-source:RunCommand%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-dest:runCommand%') AQL filter query
